title: analyze.receipt
description: Receipt for an analyze request, including derived insights and optional labels.

status.description: Outcome status for this verb invocation.

summary.description: High-level natural language summary of the analysis.

insights.description: Key findings, observations, or flagged items.

labels.description: Optional labels or categories assigned to the input.

score.description: Optional normalized score (e.g., risk, quality) between 0 and 1.
